def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) to ensure proper per-code time-series operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])
    
    # Compute the two average change segments
    # Segment 1: average daily change from day -20 to day -10
    seg1 = (delay(pl.col('close'), periods=20) - delay(pl.col('close'), periods=10)) / 10
    
    # Segment 2: average daily change from day -10 to today
    seg2 = (delay(pl.col('close'), periods=10) - pl.col('close')) / 10
    
    # Difference between the two segments
    diff = seg1 - seg2
    
    # Condition: diff < -0.05
    cond = diff < (-1 * 0.05)
    
    # If condition true -> 1, else -> -1 * (close - delay(close, 1))
    factor = pl.when(cond).then(1).otherwise(
        (-1 * 1) * (pl.col('close') - delay(pl.col('close'), periods=1))
    )
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
